nextStepMessages.processing: Resume is being processed. Analysis will run automatically.
nextStepMessages.noJobs: No jobs yet. Add at least one job, then run analysis to see match scores.
nextStepMessages.notAnalyzed: Jobs exist but no analysis has been run for this candidate yet.
nextStepMessages.stale: Analysis is over 7 days old and may be outdated. Consider refreshing.
nextStepMessages.zeroScores: All match scores are 0%. The resume and job description may be in different languages. Use Deep AI Analysis for cross-language semantic matching.
nextStepMessages.lowScores: All job match scores are below 40%. This candidate may not be a good fit.
nextStepMessages.strongMatch: Strong match detected. Shortlist this candidate to keep them in the pipeline.
nextStepMessages.shortlisted: Candidate is shortlisted. Next step: conduct an interview to complete evaluation.
nextStepMessages.interview: Interview stage — record your notes below and make a final decision.
nextStepMessages.review: Review the analysis and job matches, then make a hiring decision.

screening.timedOut: Analysis report is taking longer than expected.
screening.pendingDesc: Runs automatically after upload — usually 10–20 seconds.

jobAnalysis.skillLegend: Green = matched · Amber = gap · Gray = unclassified

matches.noMatchesDesc: Add jobs from the Jobs page, then re-upload this resume to generate matches.

smartSendPage.title: Smart Send campaigns
smartSendPage.description: Turn a target job into a guided outreach flow: generate tailored email copy, review variants, and send in controlled batches from your Gmail account.

connection.label: Connection
connection.addGmailBeforeSending: Add your Gmail SMTP connection before sending campaigns.
connection.verifyBeforeSending: Connection exists, but verification should be completed before live sending.

campaign.label: Campaign Status
campaign.inProgressDesc: Review the generated variants and control batch sending from one place.
campaign.draftReadyDesc: You already have AI-generated email variants ready for preview.
campaign.noDraftDesc: Start with a target role and company details, then generate personalized outreach.

smartSendPage.currentStepDesc: Compose, preview, send, and review history without leaving the campaign flow.

flow.label: Recommended Flow
flow.step1Desc: Set the role, company, and job description so the AI can anchor the message correctly.
flow.step2Desc: Connect Gmail once, then reuse it across future campaigns and batch sends.
flow.step3Desc: Preview variants first, then watch sent and failed activity move into history.

smtpSetup.title: Gmail setup
smtpSetup.description: Connect Gmail once, then generate and send faster.
smtpSetup.step1: Enable 2-Step Verification on your Google account
smtpSetup.step2: Go to Google Account → Security → App Passwords
smtpSetup.step3: Select app: Mail, device: Other → type "JobAI24"
smtpSetup.step4: Copy the 16-character password and paste it below

compose.title: Compose Outreach Email
compose.description: AI generates a tailored outreach email. Edit and send directly.
compose.noResumesUploaded: No resumes uploaded. Upload your resume first from the Resumes page.
compose.resumeRequiredForCampaign: A resume must be selected to attach to campaign emails.
compose.jdPlaceholder: Paste the job description to tailor the email (optional)
compose.blockedByBalance: Insufficient balance for this list — please top up first.

preview.title: Review & Send
preview.description: Choose a variant, edit, add recipients, then send.
preview.subject: Subject
preview.recipientHint: Email then optional name separated by space. Max 100.

sending.title: Sending…
sending.doNotClose: Emails are being sent one by one. Do not close this page.

history.title: Send History
history.description: All emails sent via Smart Send.

gmail.title: Connect Gmail
gmail.description: Sign in with your Gmail account to send outreach emails directly from your inbox.
gmail.step1: Click the button below to sign in with Google
gmail.step2: Grant permission to send emails on your behalf
gmail.step3: Your emails are sent directly from your Gmail inbox
gmail.requestDesc: To protect our sending reputation, Gmail access requires a one-time admin approval. Submit a request and we'll review it shortly.
gmail.pendingDesc: Your Gmail access request is awaiting admin approval. You'll be able to connect once it's approved.
gmail.approvedDesc: Your request has been approved. Click below to connect your Gmail account.
gmail.invalidGmail: Email must be a Gmail account (@gmail.com)
gmail.gmailHint: If you want to send from a different Gmail account than your site account, enter it here. Must be @gmail.com.
gmail.oauthErrorInvalidState: Session verification failed. Please try again.
gmail.oauthErrorTokenExchange: Failed to connect Gmail account. Please try again.
gmail.oauthErrorUnknown: An error occurred while connecting Gmail.

campaigns.description: Track your outreach campaigns and daily sending progress.
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet. Compose a letter and launch one.

settings.title: Campaign Settings
settings.noLists: No lists available. Ask your admin to create a distribution list.
settings.dailyLimitHint: Gmail recommends max 100/day to avoid spam flags.
settings.launched: Campaign launched! Check the Campaigns tab to track progress.
settings.launchFailed: Failed to launch campaign. Please try again.
settings.balanceSufficient: Your balance is sufficient to send the full campaign ✓

connectStep.title: Connect Email Account

resumeStep.title: Select Resume
resumeStep.description: Your resume will be used to generate the letter and attached to every message in the campaign

resumeStep.selectedHint: ✓ The letter will be generated based on this resume and attached to every message

letterStep.title: Select Letter
letterStep.descriptionWithResume: The letter will be generated based on your resume: {resumeName}
letterStep.descriptionGeneric: Choose a letter or create a new one
letterStep.resumeHint: The letter will account for your resume: {resumeName}
letterStep.generalHint: A personal marketing message highlighting your skills and achievements — no specific job mentioned
letterStep.noSavedLetters: No saved letters — create a new letter above

listStep.title: Select Distribution List

previewStep.title: Campaign Review
previewStep.description: Review the message and details before launch

launchStep.title: Campaign Launched!
launchStep.description: Sending will begin automatically within minutes
launchStep.howDesc: Your messages are sent gradually with natural intervals to avoid Gmail restrictions. Track the status from the Campaigns page.
